tuning: E A D G B E
content:
I Wanna Love You Forever
Jessica Simpson

Chorded by KayTee83


[Intro]
[ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]   x2

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
You set my soul at ease[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Em[/ch]
Chased darkness out of view[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]C[/ch]
Left your desperate spell on me[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]Em[/ch]
Say you feel it too I know you do[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]C[/ch]
I've got so much more to give[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Em[/ch]
This can't die, I yearn to live[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Pour yourself all over me[/tab]
[tab]                                       [ch]G[/ch]
And I'll cherish every drop here on my knees[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
I wanna love you for - ever[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
And this is all I'm asking of you[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
10,000 lifetimes to - gether[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
Is that so much for you to do[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]D[/ch]
Cuz from the moment that I saw your face[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
And felt the fire of your sweet embrace[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
I swear I knew[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
I wanna love you forever[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
My mind fails to understand[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
What my heart tells me to do[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C[/ch]
And I'd give up all I have just to be with you[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]
And that would do[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]C[/ch]
I've always been taught to win[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Em[/ch]
And I never thought I'd fail[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]
Be at the mercy of a man,[/tab]

I've never been
[tab]                                      [ch]G[/ch]
Now I only want to be right where you are[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
I wanna love you for - ever[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
And this is all I'm asking of you[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
10,000 lifetimes to - gether[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
Is that so much for you to do[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]D[/ch]
Cuz from the moment that I saw your face[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
And felt the fire of your sweet embrace[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
I swear I knew[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
I wanna love you forever[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                         [ch]G[/ch]
In my life I've learned that heaven never waits[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
Let's take this now before it's gone[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]
Like yesterday[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Cuz when I'm with you there's nowhere else[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]
That I would ever wanna be no[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                                   [ch]D[/ch]
I'm breathing for the next second I can feel you. My baby...[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
I'm gonna love[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
I wanna love you for - ever[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
And this is all I'm asking of you[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
10,000 lifetimes to - gether[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
Is that so much for you to do[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]D[/ch]
Cuz from the moment that I saw your face[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
And felt the fire in your sweet embrace[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
I swear I knew[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
I'm gonna love you forever. Forever...[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
I wanna love you for - ever[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
Every day. Every day.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
10,000 lifetimes to - gether[/tab]
